name: nextjs-app-router-performance
description: Next.js App Router performance assistant for fast initial loading, server-first data flow, explicit caching, and safe code splitting.

interface.shortDescription: App Router initial-load checks, server-first data flow, and safe code-splitting guidance.
interface.longDescription: Next.js App Router performance assistant for fast initial loading, server-first data flow, explicit caching, and safe code splitting. Runs production builds, checks server/client boundaries, flags risky client imports and providers, and keeps ordinary app data reads on the server.
